author: mark
text:
SKILL.md: correct the stale 'no repo field' multi-repo guidance

The 'Working in a multi-repo hub' section told agents there is no repo field and to invent a tag convention. Task.repo has existed since after that section was written, is auto-set at create, and prints on every bl show.

Rewrite the lead sentence to acknowledge bl records a create-anchored origin repo per ball, and rewrite the 'Mark the target repo' bullet to point at the repo field for per-repo triage, demoting the tag convention to a manual override.
